title: EDIF: add support for different flavors of bit indexing

features.name: multi-bit port with per-bit assignment
features.description: Code should include a module with multi-bit input and output ports where individual bits are accessed separately via bit indexing and assigned with different operations

features.name: bitwise NOT on indexed bit of multi-bit signal
features.description: Code should include a bitwise NOT operation applied to a single indexed bit of a multi-bit signal, with the result assigned to an indexed bit of another multi-bit signal

features.name: mixed per-bit passthrough and inversion on multi-bit port
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit output where some bits pass through unchanged from input while other bits are inverted, using explicit per-bit assignments
